zh.Beaugency, Loiret, Orleanais Centre, Fra: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Beaugency於大約1055年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希時，她的父親Lancelin II de Beaugency17歲，母親Alberge du Maine19歲。她和Renaud de Nevers至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1087年1月28日在法國布格享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Beaugency was born about 1055, in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Lancelin II de Beaugency, was 17 and her mother, Alberge du Maine, was 19. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Renaud de Nevers. She died on 28 January 1087, in Burgundy, France, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Beaugency est née environ 1055, à Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Lancelin II de Beaugency, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alberge du Maine, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Renaud de Nevers. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1087, à Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Beaugency um 1055 in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lancelin II de Beaugency 17 und ihre Mutter Alberge du Maine 19. Sie hatte mit Renaud de Nevers mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1087 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Beaugency è nata il circa 1055 nel Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, sua padre, Lancelin II de Beaugency, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Alberge du Maine, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Renaud de Nevers. Morì il 28 gennaio 1087, nel Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.Beaugency, Loiret, Orleanais Centre, Fra: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Beaugency(이)가 대략 1055년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lancelin II de Beaugency(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alberge du Maine(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Renaud de Nevers(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1087년 1월 28일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Beaugency родилась около 1055 г. в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Lancelin II de Beaugency было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alberge du Maine, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Renaud de Nevers. Она умерла 28 января 1087 г. в местности бургогн, Франция в возрасте 33 лет.
